violations.text: The kitchen staff do not have food safety manager certification from an accredited course. Proof of registration and completion of course to be sent to inspector by 11/26/25. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

The houses does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine in Greenhouse #21 has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
